nodes.name: CapturableProperty
nodes.description: Describes a property path that can be captured. It just exposes a display name but uses internal data in order to be able to capture exception properties, like materials

nodes.name: glTFRuntimeAnimationCurveRemapper
nodes.description: Gl TFRuntime Animation Curve Remapper Delegate Signature

nodes.name: RigUnit_HierarchyAddPhysicsSolver
nodes.description: Adds a new physics solver to the hierarchy. Note: This node only runs as part of the construction event.

nodes.name: AnimGraphNode_CustomTransitionResult
nodes.description: Anim Graph Node Custom Transition Result

nodes.name: DisplayClusterConfiguration_PostRenderBlur
nodes.description: EDisplay Cluster Configuration Post Render Blur

nodes.name: AnimNode_PreviewRetargetPose
nodes.description: a node just to preview a retarget pose

nodes.name: CameraRigProxyAsset
nodes.description: A proxy for a camera rig asset. This is useful for indicating that a camera rig should be activated in a camera director, but without hard-referencing a particular camera rig. This way, that camera director can be used by multiple cameras with their own camera rigs.

nodes.name: PawnNoiseEmitterComponent
nodes.description: PawnNoiseEmitterComponent tracks noise event data used by SensingComponents to hear a Pawn. This component is intended to exist on either a Pawn or its Controller. It does nothing on network clients.

nodes.name: RigUnit_TwistBones
nodes.description: Creates a gradient of twist rotation along a chain.

nodes.name: PythonLogOutputEntry
nodes.description: Log output entry captured from Python.

nodes.name: RigVMFunction_StringToLowercase
nodes.description: Converts the string to lower case

nodes.name: _WrapperBase
nodes.description: Base type for all Unreal exposed types

nodes.name: SequencerViewModelStructExtensions
nodes.description: Function library containing methods that should be hoisted onto FSequencerScriptingRanges

nodes.name: AlembicImportType
nodes.description: Enum that describes type of asset to import

nodes.name: make_noise
nodes.description: Cache noises instigated by the owning pawn for AI sensing

nodes.name: STATIC_MESH
nodes.description: Imports only the first frame as one or multiple static meshes

nodes.name: GEOMETRY_CACHE
nodes.description: Imports the Alembic file as flipbook and matrix animated objects

nodes.name: SKELETAL
nodes.description: Imports the Alembic file as a skeletal mesh containing base poses as morph targets and blending between them to achieve the correct animation frame
